title: campanula decumbens subsp. baetica
intro: Campanula decumbens subsp. baetica, also known as Baetic bellflower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Campanulaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The Baetic bellflower is typically prepared as an infusion, tincture, or tea, allowing for a range of herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
